sections.paragraph: μεταμέλομαι [μετά, μέλω ‘be an object of care, care for’] ‘be very concerned about one’s deed or attitude’, regret Mt 21:29, 32; 27:3; 2 Cor 7:8; Hb 7:21. A diminished aspect, change one’s mind, may be suggested by the contexts of Mt 21:29, 32; Hb 7:21, but the rendering is not linguistically conclusive.
